step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a solid white background. The Z is inside a navy blue filled circle, and the C has a light teal circular halo around it. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a solid white background. The Z is inside a navy blue filled circle, and the C has a light teal circular halo around it. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Inside shape: Z is inside a navy blue filled circle
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium, occupies about 25% of image width

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: light teal (matches Grey/Neutral secondary_light #89d0c8)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour ⚠
  Gradient colours: light teal
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: ZONNIC logo font only
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, white, light teal
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: used as accent (halo around C)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo centered left on a solid white background. The logo text is navy blue, and the Z is inside a navy blue filled circle, which is a standard design element. The C has a light teal circular halo around it, matching the Grey/Neutral secondary palette. The halo is a solid colour, not a gradient. No regulatory text, nicotine warning, 18+ icon, or risk communication is visible anywhere in the image. The logo is clear, undistorted, and uses the correct font and colours. The clear space around the logo is sufficient, and no other elements intrude. However, the halo around the C should be a gradient (not a solid colour) on white backgrounds, and the required regulatory warnings and icons are missing entirely. These are critical issues for compliance.

No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.

No gradient background present, so gradient rules do not apply.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image, including both English and French statements.
violations.evidence: No regulatory text found at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, risk communication, 18+ icon) are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements found at top or bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the image.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The halo around the C is a solid colour, not a gradient, on a white background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to a gradient using both the primary and secondary colours from the Grey/Neutral palette.
violations.evidence: Halo is light teal only, not a gradient.
